title: About Me

headline.line1: On the path to becoming a

bio: Security comes first. My goal is to understand the threats in cloud environments and build products that defend against them. Development skills are a means to implement security more effectively, and full-stack experience gives me the foundation to design and build security products directly.
callout: I think from the attacker's perspective first.

balance.title: Attacker Mindset
balance.text: Before thinking about defense, I think about how an attacker would approach it. Vulnerabilities should be found at the design stage, not after the feature is complete.

communication.title: Security by Design
communication.text: Security isn't something you add later. Starting with threat modeling at the requirements stage is what makes meaningful defense possible.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.text: Clear goals reduce unnecessary confusion. I think aligning the team's direction is actually the fastest way forward.

growth.title: Continuous Learning
growth.text: Threats keep evolving. Staying current with new attack techniques and defense strategies is the most fundamental attitude for a security professional.
